title: Pure Black Menus
description: [ARCHIVE] Pure Black Menus is a resource pack that's great for OLED screens!
body:
## This project is no longer updated. If you want an alternative, try [OLED](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/oled). ## Pure Black Menus **High Contrast for older versions!** This is a resource pack which adds pure black menus for OLED screens. That's all there is to it!
Versions Available mod versions can be found on the [Versions tab](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pure-black-menus/versions).
Other ### Version Format **mc1.9-v0.1** - mc: the version of minecraft that version works on - v: the version of the mod
[![Ultraservers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/975b29c3c9453d777f239cad60e4ca56382f2d54_0.webp)](https://ultraservers.com/stovonson)
made by splewsh
